eventLog: The goblin snaps back at you, but misses.
The goblin answers with an attack roll: 6 + 1 = 7.
You carve into the goblin for 12 damage.
The Dungeon Master calls for a Strength roll. DC 10.
You rush the goblin and commit to close combat.
The goblin strikes back, but you avoid the blow.
The goblin answers with an attack roll: 5 + 1 = 6.
Your punch lands cleanly and deals 10 damage.
The Dungeon Master calls for a Strength roll. DC 10.
You tighten your fists and drive forward into close combat.
You attempt: "i punch the goblin in the face"
